params.context: CRITICAL FIX DEPLOYED: h2_end_stream=1 (was 2). #528 etap confirmed: 1414 bytes written with END_STREAM on DATA frame (no delayed END_STREAM race). But test PC had DevTools CLOSED so couldn't verify browser received bytes. APF triggered but retry showed AI response.

check_details.key_difference_from_528: #528 had DevTools closed. #529 MUST have DevTools Network tab open BEFORE sending prompt.
check_details.expected_behavior: Warning text '보안 경고' appears in chat area via qianwen SSE envelope
devtools_check_instructions: 2. Go to Network tab, filter by 'chat' or 'api'
4. Look at the FIRST api/v2/chat request (the one APF blocks)
5. Check Response tab: does it show SSE data with warning text?
6. Check size column: should be >0 bytes (NOT 0.0 kB like #527)
7. If a second retry request appears, note its timing
8. SCREENSHOT the DevTools Network tab showing both requests
9. SCREENSHOT the chat area (whether warning shows or AI response)
check_details.success_criteria: If first request shows >0 bytes response body with SSE warning content, the H2 fix is confirmed even if retry overwrites the display
